title: koeleria albovii var. fominii
intro: Koeleria albovii var. fominii, also known as Fomin's hair-grass, is a subspecies of the Koeleria albovii plant, which belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koeleria albovii var. fominii include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
